---
title: " "
toc: false
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    toc: false
    # bread-crumb: true
    # include-before-body: _partials/nav.html
listing:
  - id: main-listing
    contents: "../posts/**/*.qmd"
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    filter-ui: true
    categories: true
    page-size: 9
    image-height: "250px"
    fields: [image, date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
---

:::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12}
## Latest Posts
::: {#main-listing}
:::
:::
::::
